title: lasianthus oblanceolatus
intro: Lasianthus oblanceolatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus oblanceolatus include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus oblanceolatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
